Diana Chen

Partner San Francisco dchen@thornfield.example.com

Biography

Diana Chen is a partner in the firm's technology transactions group. She advises technology companies, private equity sponsors, and strategic acquirers on complex mergers, acquisitions, and licensing arrangements.

Practice Areas

  • Mergers & Acquisitions
  • Technology Transactions
  • Private Equity
  • Licensing

Industries

  • Technology
  • Private Equity
  • Media & Entertainment

Education

  • B.A. in Computer Science, Stanford University, 2004
